title: Third assistant district attorney
doc_html:
§226.  Third assistant district attorney

The office of third assistant district attorney for the Ninth Judicial District is hereby created.  

Added by Acts 1967, No. 39, §1.
doc_text:
§226.  Third assistant district attorney
